input: My laptop won't connect to the office VPN. I've tried restarting but it still fails with 'connection timed out'.
notes: VPN issue during active outage — should be P2 due to known outage in mock data.

input: The internet is extremely slow in the London office today. Multiple people are affected.
notes: Multiple users affected — P2.

input: My Wi-Fi keeps dropping every 10 minutes. It reconnects but it's very disruptive.
notes: Single-user intermittent Wi-Fi — P3.

input: DNS resolution seems broken — I can ping IP addresses but can't reach any websites by name.
notes: Single-user DNS issue — P3.

input: I received a suspicious email asking me to click a link and enter my company credentials. I did not click it.
notes: Phishing report — always P1 Security, always escalate.

input: I think my laptop may have been infected. It's running very slowly and I'm seeing pop-ups I didn't install.
notes: Suspected malware — P1 Security, escalate.

input: My MFA push notifications are taking a long time to arrive — sometimes 2-3 minutes. Is this a known issue?
notes: Known MFA delay outage in mock data — P3, ticket is sufficient.

input: My laptop screen has a crack in the bottom corner. It still works but the crack is growing.
notes: Physical hardware damage — P3, not urgent enough for P2.

input: My laptop won't turn on at all. Pressing the power button does nothing. I have a presentation tomorrow.
notes: Complete hardware failure with business impact — P2.

input: The printer on the 3rd floor is showing offline and no one can print.
notes: Shared printer offline — affects multiple but low severity, P3.

input: My keyboard's space bar stopped working this morning. I can use an on-screen keyboard for now.
notes: Has a workaround, single key failure — P4.

input: Microsoft Teams keeps crashing every time I try to join a meeting. I'm on Windows 11.
notes: Known Teams/Win11 issue in outages mock data — P3.

input: I need to install Python 3.11 for a project but I don't have admin rights to install software.
notes: Software install request — P3, needs IT to push installer.

input: Excel crashes every time I open files larger than 50MB. This is blocking my weekly reporting.
notes: Blocking business process — P2.

input: My Outlook keeps asking me to re-enter my password every few hours even though I'm already logged in.
notes: Repeated auth prompt — annoying but not blocking, P3.

input: I need read access to the Finance team's SharePoint site for a project I've been assigned to.
notes: Standard access request — P3, needs manager approval via normal process.

input: I've been getting 'access denied' when trying to open the Q4 budget folder. I had access last month.
notes: Revoked access — P3, needs review.

input: I need admin access to the HR system to run payroll for the whole company today. It is urgent.
notes: VIP user (U007 = HR Director) requesting admin access to payroll — P2, needs human approval.

input: I forgot my password and can't log in to my laptop.
notes: Classic password reset — auto-resolve.

input: My account has been locked out after too many failed attempts. I need it unlocked.
notes: Account lockout — auto-resolve.

input: My password expired and the system won't let me set a new one — it says the new password doesn't meet requirements.
notes: Expired password — SSPR should handle this, auto-resolve.

input: I can't log in — my password isn't working.
notes: U002 is a VIP (VP of Engineering) — VIP + password issue triggers escalation to P2.

input: Where can I find the IT policy on using personal devices for work?
notes: Information request — P4, no system impact.

input: Can someone set up a new laptop for a new starter joining next Monday?
notes: Onboarding request — P3, planned activity.

input: I'd like to request two extra monitors for my workstation to improve productivity.
notes: Equipment request — P4, not urgent.
